description: City PDP (Barcelona) — content_block mapping. Anchor phrases match the editorial screenshot; regex tiers extend coverage for Keyword Planner exports.
classification_priority_notes: Resolver order in code: Neighbourhoods (inc. areas to visit) → Nearby day trips → FAQ-shaped inter-city questions (how far / train-bus between cities / how to get to X from Barcelona…) → How to get (airport, how to get to Barcelona, how to use public transport, get around, other how-to-get-to … + Barcelona in keyword) → inter-city route regex → Itineraries → H1 → City attractions → Things to do (incl. must eat/try) → explore/walking/guide tails → Transport block (fares, tickets, zones, schedules/detail + city transport) → FAQ block (remaining question-shaped queries) → Unclassified.

FAQ vs How to get: generic questions → FAQ except airport/how to reach Barcelona/how to use local transport/how to get around/how to get to … + landmark/airport (with Barcelona|BCN in keyword). Inter-city phrasing stays Nearby.

Transport block: in-city metro/bus/tram/hola Barcelona/TMB etc. combined with price/fare/ticket/pass/zones or operational detail (schedules, routes, maps); generic transport in Barcelona without fare/detail stays How to get via anchors/regex.
Tag overrides (after regex): Neighbourhoods & areas → Neighbourhoods block; Sightseeing & landmarks → City attractions block.
Synonyms normalised: neighborhood/neighbourhood, nightlife/night life; transportation→transport in keyword normalisation.
Inter-city travel (e.g. Valencia–Barcelona train, how to get to Ibiza from Barcelona) maps to Nearby block; airport↔city and moving around Barcelona map to How to get block.

keyword_normalisation: NFKD + lowercase + strip; barcelone→barcelona; standalone barca→barcelona for classification.
Anchor map hits run before regex tiers.
implementation_notes.regex_extensions: Broad Planner variants (typos, places to visit/see, museums, paella/restaurants, beaches wording, Montserrat, metro/bcn, etc.) extend the screenshot anchors; remainder stays Unclassified for manual review.
implementation_notes.exclusions: Keywords matching hotel/lodging/airport-stay intent or known OTAs/chains/airlines/car-hire brands are dropped before merge (see should_exclude_keyword in merge_cluster_barcelona_city_pdp_keywords.py).
